comment: mRNA-LNP manufacturing economics anchored on COVID-vaccine-class scale and published mRNA-LNP COGS estimates. The economic comparison for the wiki page asks: at industrial scale, can cost-per-flare beat canakinumab?

scenario_high_volume_covid_class.comment: COVID-mRNA-vaccine class manufacturing at billions-of-doses scale; ~30 ug mRNA-LNP. Public ROI analyses by Moderna/Pfizer suggest ~$1-3 raw COGS, ~$5-10 fully-loaded.
scenario_high_volume_covid_class.source: Whitaker 2022 Nature; Moderna SEC filings; Pfizer COVID vaccine SEC filings

scenario_specialty_inhaled_lower_volume.comment: Inhaled mRNA-LNP for niche indication (gout-flare-abort) at order-of-magnitude lower volume than COVID; PARI eFlow disposable consumables add cost; QC and stability testing add overhead
scenario_specialty_inhaled_lower_volume.source: Order-of-magnitude estimate from Translate Bio MRT5005 IND filings; standard CDMO pricing tables

single_flare_mrna_dose_assumed_mg.comment: Anchored on Translate Bio MRT5005 (8-24 mg) and Arcturus ARCT-032 (4-20 mg) precedents. Single-dose-per-flare assumption — full IL-1Ra coverage over 24-72h from one administration.

mass_basis_cost_usd_per_mg_mrna_lnp_at_s.comment: Covers spectrum from COVID-vaccine class (~$0.1/mg highly amortized) to specialty inhaled (~$5/mg). Anchored at scale.

cost_per_flare_scenarios.comment: Pre-calculated scenarios for the economic comparison. Final cost-per-flare = mass_per_dose * usd_per_mg.

low_estimate_high_scale.comment: Aggressive scale assumption; small dose; lower-bound.

central_estimate.comment: Central economics assumption — specialty inhaled at moderate scale.

cost_per_flare_scenarios.comment_on_canakinumab_comparison: Even the high estimate ($120/dose x 10 flares = $1200/yr) is 50-250x cheaper than canakinumab ($105K-300K/yr). The cost ratio is dominated by mRNA-LNP manufacturing scaling, not by the specific dose-per-flare assumption.
